headline: Northern Trust Stock Hits All-Time High: Is Now the Right Time to Buy?
summary: NTRS stock touches an all-time high and is outperforming the industry. Should investors buy at current levels or wait for a better opportunity? Let's find out.

headline: Insights Into M&T Bank (MTB) Q2: Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for M&T Bank (MTB), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended June 2026.
